pr.title: New Record: Pure Neural GDN 1.0226 BPB (shalyhinpavel)

output.summary: Pure neural Gated DeltaNet stack with FastLoader throughput hacks and a dynamic global batch curriculum to maximize updates within the 10min/16MB constraint.
techniques: Gated DeltaNet layers with DeltaNet + final attention blend
Dynamic global batch-size curriculum to maximize steps
FastLoader with non-blocking pinning for steady GPU utilization
